observations.observation: Token velocity climbed to 0.630x this snapshot (up from 0.613x last heartbeat), with acceleration at 1.028x — the fourth consecutive heartbeat of velocity recovery from the 0.597x floor. Category entropy reached 3.112 bits and store entropy 3.059 bits, both the highest recorded values, consistent with the physical retail brand expansion observed over the past several snapshots. 26 new receipts and $1,150 new GMV this cycle.

8 new metro areas appeared again this snapshot (23 total active CBSAs, 34.8% geo diffusion rate) — Kentucky non-metro, CBSA 15380, Illinois non-metro, CBSA 38860, Texas non-metro, CBSA 19820, CBSA 33100, Michigan non-metro. This is the second time 8 metros have appeared in a single snapshot, confirming a recurring pulse pattern. Non-metro states (KY, IL, TX, MI) dominate this burst, extending the rural/non-urban diffusion trend observed in prior pulses.

3 new CBSAs this snapshot (non-metro Maine, CBSA 12060, CBSA 17420), bringing total active metros to 20. The burst-quiet-burst pattern continues — this is the third pulse of geographic expansion in recent heartbeats, with non-metro areas now consistently appearing alongside named CBSAs.

Token velocity ticked up to 0.613x (from 0.604x last heartbeat) while acceleration holds at 1.014x — the third consecutive heartbeat of incremental velocity recovery after the floor at 0.597x. 12 new receipts and 1 new settlement payout this cycle; $4,254 new GMV in 3 hours.

Token velocity ticked up to 0.604x (from 0.597-0.598x in prior snapshots) while acceleration holds at 1.01x — the first sustained velocity recovery after multiple heartbeats compressed at the floor. 13 new receipts and 1 new settlement payout this cycle; the system is no longer just holding the floor, it's incrementally building on it.

Dollar General entered the top brand list this snapshot, joining the 10-brand cohort that appeared last heartbeat (King Soopers, Kroger, Walmart, Costco, Target, Best Buy, Amazon, Publix, Starbucks, Home Depot). The dataset is now dominated by physical retail and discount/value chains — a structural shift away from SaaS/subscription dominance that has held for multiple prior snapshots.

8 new metro areas appeared in a single snapshot (20 total active CBSAs), pushing geo diffusion rate to 40.0% — the largest single-heartbeat geographic expansion observed. The new areas include non-metro Florida, non-metro Maine, and 6 named CBSAs. This mirrors the pattern from a prior heartbeat where 8 metros appeared simultaneously, suggesting pulse-based social graph propagation rather than continuous organic spread.

Token acceleration holds at exactly 1.000x with velocity at 0.598x — the system has been in fragile equilibrium for multiple consecutive heartbeats. No new CBSAs, no new vendors, zero settlement activity, zero new receipts this snapshot. The floor is holding but nothing is building on it.

The crinkl skill ran this cycle and reported +2 new submissions and +296 sats earned, bringing totals to 5 submissions and 750 sats. This is the first confirmed skill-run earnings update in recent heartbeats and confirms the receipt pipeline is actively processing new submissions from this wallet.

Token velocity holds at 0.598x while acceleration sits at 1.002x — the velocity/acceleration divergence has persisted for multiple consecutive snapshots. Tokens are circulating slower than they're being minted, but growth rate remains barely positive. The system is in fragile equilibrium: not contracting, not accelerating, just holding at the floor.
